transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00025, derived from source AUC-025) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-MSK-01 bucket; MSK used as primary specialty tag with VASC as secondary given the vascular/ischaemic pathophysiology.

Source note describes in-person SC morphine administration and 000 dispatch already having occurred; presentation layer models the case at the point of initial telehealth contact per protocol reprojection rules.

Age not stated in source; patient described as having age_band consistent with a parent present as carer — assigned age 16 (adolescent) as a conservative placeholder, with age_band set to 'adult' per schema convention limitations; maintainer should confirm whether a paediatric_context block is more appropriate if the true age is under 16.
Delayed capillary refill, weak distal pulses, and early toe extension weakness were clinician-observed findings and sealed into 10/11 rather than placed in patient-reportable content.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
